titles.en: Reward of reciting Sub-h’aanallaah a hundred times
Reward of reciting Sub-h’aanallaah a hundred times

segments: حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ یُونُسَ بْنِ یَعْقُوبَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَنْ قَالَ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ مِائَهَ مَرَّهٍ کَانَ مِمَّنْ ذَکَرَ اللَّهَ کَثِیراً قَالَ نَعَمْ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ یُونُسَ بْنِ یَعْقُوبَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَنْ قَالَ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ مِائَهَ مَرَّهٍ کَانَ مِمَّنْ ذَکَرَ اللَّهَ کَثِیراً قَالَ نَعَمْ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Ibn Fadhal from Yunis b. Ya’qub who said: Yunus bin Yaqoob says that he asked Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.), “[O son of Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.)] One who recites Sub-h’aanallaah a hundred times, will he be counted among the ones who remember Allah a lot?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Yes.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Ibn Fadhal from Yunis b. Ya’qub who said: Yunus bin Yaqoob says that he asked Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.), “[O son of Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.)] One who recites Sub-h’aanallaah a hundred times, will he be counted among the ones who remember Allah a lot?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Yes.”

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ

parts.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ
